tagline: Your Family & Veteran Owned Pool Service Experts in Greater St. Louis

hero.headline:
Veteran-Owned Pool Care St. Louis
Families Trust
hero.subheadline: For 18 years, our certified, background-checked technicians have kept Greater St. Louis pools crystal clear. We document every visit and send you a full report so you always know exactly what was done. Relax and enjoy your backyard — we handle the rest.

services.label: Our Pool Services
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Care for<br class="hidden md:block">Greater St. Louis Homeowners
services.subtitle: From spring openings to winter closings and everything in between, Paradise Pools STL keeps your pool safe, clean, and swim-ready all season long.

cards.title: Pool Opening
cards.description: Complete spring opening starting at $400. We remove covers, lower anchors, install hardware, and fire up your filtration. Opening Plus adds cleaning and chlorine for $500.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Reliable weekly visits starting at $70. We skim debris, empty baskets, and run a full chemical check so your pool is always ready for a swim.

cards.title: Pool Closing & Winterization
cards.description: Protect your pool through harsh St. Louis winters. We use advanced wet chemistry testing to close at precise chemical levels, safeguarding pipes and equipment from freeze damage.

cards.title: Equipment Sales & Installation
cards.description: New pumps, filters, and energy-efficient filtration systems installed by certified techs. We keep your pool running clean and clear with professional-grade equipment.

cards.title: Saltwater Pool Systems
cards.description: Convert your chlorine pool to saltwater or maintain your existing system. Our technicians are trained in saltwater installation, servicing, and repair throughout St. Louis County.

cards.title: Pool Repairs & Plumbing
cards.description: Leak detection, plumbing repairs, and complete in-ground concrete pool renovations. We diagnose the problem fast and fix it right the first time.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Crystal-Clear Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we will come out for a no-obligation inspection. We assess your pool's condition and provide an honest, upfront quote within 24 hours.

steps.title: Our Certified Techs Go to Work
steps.description: Every background-checked technician arrives on schedule, performs the service, and documents everything. You receive a detailed report after each visit for complete transparency.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Paradise
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling, balanced, and swim-ready all season. If anything is not right, we come back and make it right at no extra charge — that is our veteran's promise.

about.label: Why St. Louis Trusts Paradise Pools
about.headline: Family & Veteran Owned — Serving STL Since 2008
about.description: Founded by Greg Maurath Jr. in 2008, Paradise Pools STL has grown from a one-man operation into the Greater St. Louis area's trusted full-service pool company. As a family and veteran owned business, we bring military-grade discipline to every pool we touch. Every technician is certified, background checked, and committed to earning your trust one visit at a time.

features.title: Certified & Background-Checked Techs
features.description: Every technician passes a thorough background check and holds professional pool certifications before they ever step into your backyard.

features.title: Documented Service Reports
features.description: After every visit, you receive a detailed report with photos and notes. You always know exactly what was done and what your pool needs next.

features.title: Veteran's Honor Guarantee
features.description: Not satisfied? We come back and redo the work at no charge. Our reputation is built on doing what we say — every single time.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Fair, upfront pricing from a veteran-owned business. Weekly maintenance starts at $70/visit. No hidden fees, no contracts required.

guarantee.headline: Our Veteran's Honor Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back to make it right at no additional cost. We built Paradise Pools STL on the same values we served our country with — integrity, accountability, and doing what we say we will do. Your satisfaction is not just a promise, it is our standard.

faqs.question: How soon can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For urgent situations like a green pool or equipment failure, we do our best to get to you within 24-48 hours. Just give us a call at 314-665-5500.

faqs.question: Do your technicians need me to be home?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. After each visit, you will receive a detailed service report with photos so you know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: Are all your technicians background checked?
faqs.answer: Yes, every single technician is background checked, certified, and fully insured. As a veteran-owned company, we take trust and safety seriously. You can feel confident about who is in your backyard.

faqs.question: Can you convert my pool to saltwater?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in saltwater system installation and conversion throughout St. Louis County. We will evaluate your current setup, recommend the right equipment, and handle the full conversion professionally.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve around St. Louis?
faqs.answer: We serve the Greater St. Louis Area including Chesterfield, Ballwin, Manchester, Des Peres, Wildwood, Frontenac, Town and Country, Ladue, Kirkwood, Sunset Hills, Fenton, and surrounding communities.

testimonials.name: Allie G.
testimonials.text: Very knowledgeable, provided excellent service at a reasonable price. Highly recommend their pool opening and water balancing services.

testimonials.name: Facebook Reviewer
testimonials.text: Paradise Pools has been maintaining our pool for years. Their technicians are always professional, thorough, and reliable. They document everything and send reports after each visit which gives us great peace of mind.

testimonials.name: Local Customer
testimonials.text: Family and veteran owned business that truly cares about their customers. Fair pricing and quality work every time. Would not trust anyone else with our pool.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation quote from our veteran-owned team. We respond within 24 hours with honest pricing and a plan tailored to your pool.
